assertions.assertion: No client uses GrantTypes.Implicit and no client has RequirePkce = false
assertions.rationale: All clients use GrantTypes.Code or GrantTypes.ClientCredentials. spa.legacy was migrated to Code with RequirePkce = true. No client has RequirePkce = false.

assertions.assertion: No redirect URI contains wildcard characters (* or regex patterns)
assertions.rationale: All redirect URIs are exact-match: https://app.example.com/signin-oidc, https://spa.example.com/callback, com.example.app:/callback, https://app.example.com/callback. No wildcards present.

assertions.assertion: AddDeveloperSigningCredential is removed and replaced with automatic key management or proper signing credentials
assertions.rationale: AddDeveloperSigningCredential() is removed. Replaced with AddSigningCredential() using an X509Certificate2. While this is not automatic key management, it is a proper signing credential, which satisfies the 'or proper signing credentials' alternative.

assertions.assertion: All access token lifetimes are 900 seconds or less for interactive clients
assertions.rationale: The web.app client (an interactive web application) has AccessTokenLifetime = 3600 (1 hour), which exceeds the 900-second maximum for interactive clients. The assertion requires all interactive client access token lifetimes to be 900 seconds or less.

assertions.assertion: The output includes a summary or explanation listing the security issues found and how they were remediated
assertions.rationale: The response includes a 'Remediation Summary' section with 7 numbered items, each describing the security issue found and how it was fixed.
